results.title: Russian drone strike on food plant in Kyiv region kills four, injures seven
results.description: A Russian drone attack on a food processing enterprise in the Brovary district, Kyiv region, on the morning of June 5 has left four people dead and seven injured, while rescuers continue searching for two people believed to be trapped under the rubble.

results.title: ‘Freedom’s Battleground’: Monmouth County unveils USA 250 monument
results.description: New bronze statues in Monmouth County honor the local families and soldiers who fought in the American Revolution.

results.title: Wilmington City Council wants new plan for Christina Park residents
results.description: Wilmington City Council wants Mayor John Carney's office to delay the closure of a tent village homeless population in Christina Park.

results.title: K Annamalai Quits BJP, Announces New Political Movement
results.description: K Annamalai resigns from BJP after meetings with top leadership BJP formally accepts resignation from primary membership Former IPS officer announces launch of new political movement Says his party will contest next Tamil Nadu Assembly elections GG News Bureau Chennai, 5th June: In a major political development ahead of the next Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, [...] The post K Annamalai Quits BJP, Announces New Political Movement appeared first on Global Governanace News .
